description: Compute QC metrics (genes/counts per cell, mitochondrial/ribosomal/hemoglobin fractions), write before/after QC plots, filter cells and genes by thresholds, and optionally run Scrublet doublet detection and drop doublets.
rules: run FIRST on raw counts, before normalization
read-only input — writes a new qc_filtered.h5ad + figures under record_store
filters: min/max genes per cell, min/max counts, min cells per gene, max pct mitochondrial
optional SCRUBLET doublet removal; figures skipped with NO_PLOTS
usage: Set INPUT. Optional: MIN_GENES, MAX_GENES, MIN_COUNTS, MAX_COUNTS, MIN_CELLS, MT_THRESHOLD, SCRUBLET=1, NO_PLOTS=1. Output: qc_filtered.h5ad.
limitation: Requires scanpy installed; SCRUBLET additionally needs scikit-image. Without scanpy the porter writes a {} placeholder qc_filtered.h5ad and still passes.
